diagrams.title: Cache Address Division
diagrams.description: Shows how main memory address is split into tag, index, and offset fields for set-associative cache
elements: Block offset bits (selects byte within block)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding address mapping in cache systems

diagrams.title: 4-Way Set Associative Cache Structure
diagrams.description: Internal organization showing sets and ways with tags, valid bits, and data blocks
elements: Each way contains: Tag, Valid bit, Dirty bit, Data block
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing cache hardware organization and data storage

diagrams.title: Cache Read Hit Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow of CPU read request processing in set-associative cache
diagrams.purpose: Understanding cache access timing and hit/miss detection

diagrams.title: Associativity Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison of direct-mapped (1-way), 2-way, 4-way, and fully associative cache mapping
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how associativity affects block placement flexibility
